task_objective: Prevent automatic lifecycle notifications from showing when Automatic Sync is disabled while preserving backend skip logging.
design_decisions: Added a module-level autoSyncNotificationsEnabled mirror because the Steam lifecycle watcher runs outside React component state.
Suppressed only the initial lifecycle toasts when auto-sync is disabled; backend handle_game_start and handle_game_exit calls still run so skip logs remain available.
Left manual Force Backup and Force Restore notifications unchanged.
results: Confirmed the new frontend static test failed before implementation.
Verified targeted frontend static tests pass after implementation.
Verified TypeScript typecheck, Ruff check, Ruff format, ty, and the full pytest suite pass.
